title: Mortgage-by-Income Authority Cluster — Implementation
rationale: GSC API live data (90d, 640 query+page rows) showed 116 unique mortgage queries with real demand but zero indexed targeted pages. The site currently appears at position 70-97 (page 7-9) for these queries. Created 10 original income-tier guides targeting the highest-volume queries.

gsc_queries_targeted.query: what mortgage can i afford on 40k
what mortgage can i afford on 100k
if i make 100k what mortgage can i afford
how much mortgage can i afford on 100k
how much mortgage can i afford

content_structure_per_page.math_verified: DTI calculations independently verified via node REPL: 60K/yr @ 28% DTI = $218,848 home (matches)

internal_linking_added: Mortgage calculator page → all 10 mortgage-on-* guides (income tier buttons)
Each mortgage-on-* page → 3 related tools/* + 9 peer income pages

verification.lint: npm run lint exit 0 (78 warnings, 0 errors)
verification.build: npx next build succeeded, all 10 pages prerendered as SSG

expected_impact_timeline.week_1: Pages live, Google discovers via new internal links
expected_impact_timeline.week_2_to_4: Google crawls and indexes; first impressions trickle in
expected_impact_timeline.month_2_to_3: Position improvements as Google validates content quality and internal linking
expected_impact_timeline.month_4: Mature rankings; should be producing measurable impressions

honest_caps.10_pages_alone_wont_hit_200k: This is one cluster of 10 pages. Hitting 200K/month requires ~100x this scale across multiple topic clusters + backlinks + brand authority.
honest_caps.indexing_not_guaranteed: Same Google quality filter that de-indexed the tools/* templates could apply here. The math is original but the template structure is shared.
honest_caps.position_uncertainty: Even with original content, ranking top 10 requires authority signals we don't have yet.

next_clusters_to_build.investment_by_income: Same pattern for investment questions (60+ imp across 'how much should i invest on $X' queries)
next_clusters_to_build.retirement_by_age: Pattern for age-based retirement queries ('can i retire at X with $Y')
next_clusters_to_build.debt_payoff_by_balance: Pattern for 'how long to pay off $X debt at Y%'
